calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar May-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EZEKIEL D. CARDER OF THE WEINBERG ROGER & ROSENFELD LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-510-337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter; Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court received an e-mail from the moving party requesting a continuance. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to May 12, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
